message.content:
@startuml
actor MobileApp
participant Apollo
database Storage
interface Ironclad
boundary Onfido

MobileApp ->> Apollo : Any proof of XYZ or document related call\nthat could result in a call to Onfido
Apollo->Storage:GetLocalApplicant(sub)
alt [when the user was previously provisioned as an onfido applicant] 
    return Applicant { Id = sub; ApplicantId = OnfidoApplicantId;}  
else  [when the user was not previously provisioned]   
return null    
end alt 

note right of Apollo #D3D3D3:getUserInfo() \ngetClaims()\nonboardUserToOnFido();\nsaveNewlyCreatedUserIdentifiersInDBAndReturnThemAsResponseObject;\nnote over this line is just for illustration purposes - actual implementation may vary depending upon your requirements.\nNote also there are many ways one can implement such functionality so feel free adapt accordingly based off what works best within context given specific needs at hand!


@enduml
